prompt: Our Supabase database connection keeps timing out during the batch PDF extraction script. We're processing 50+ games and hitting 'connection pool exceeded' errors around game 15-20. The script hangs and we have to manually kill it. How do I debug and fix this?
expected_output: Diagnosis of connection pool exhaustion, steps to increase pool size, query optimization suggestions, async connection management best practices, monitoring for future issues

assertions.name: Connection pool diagnosis included
assertions.description: Response diagnoses the root cause as connection pool exhaustion or similar infrastructure issue

assertions.name: Pool size increase guidance provided
assertions.description: Provides specific steps to increase connection pool size in Supabase

assertions.name: Query optimization suggestions
assertions.description: Includes recommendations for optimizing queries to reduce connection consumption

assertions.name: Async connection management
assertions.description: Discusses best practices for managing async connections and preventing pool exhaustion

assertions.name: Monitoring and prevention
assertions.description: Provides guidance on monitoring connection usage and preventing future issues

assertions.name: Code examples provided
assertions.description: Includes executable code examples (Python or scripts) demonstrating fixes
